creator: khenarghot@gmail.com
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1
 

After ports update and make distrcean all work prefect. But before
that I changed distinfo myself and install neon28. Now I have two
backups of distinfo and new own are same. But new file contain
different checksums than I get yesterday using md5 and sha256 utilites.


> On Wed, Sep 17, 2008 at 02:59:09PM +0000, Egorov N.V. wrote:
>
>>> Synopsis:       www/neon28 port missmatch checksum
>>>
>>> Description:
>>>
>> During installation of neon28 get missmatch checksum for
>> neon-0.28.3.tar.gz.
>>
>>> How-To-Repeat:
>>>
>>> Fix:
>>>
>> Change values at distinfo.
>>
>
> Please run "make distclean" and try again. If it keeps happening,
> please give the output of "ls -al /usr/ports/distfiles/neon*" and
> the contents of your distinfo and the output of "make -v PKGNAME".
>
> Edwin
>
